title: DPE Pipeline Variant
description: Schema for a single variant file under <pipeline>/variants/*.yaml|*.json

pipeline.description: Pipeline name. Must match containing folder name.

variant.description: Variant name. Must match file basename (without extension).

extends.description: Optional. Name of a variant (in the same pipeline) to inherit from.

overrides.description: Patches applied after extends load. Keys = stage names; values = partial stage configs deep-merged onto the base.

stages.description: Map of stage-name → stage config. Stage names must be unique and match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*$.

tool.description: Tool name. Resolved via pipeline's tools/, then runner's tools_paths[], then built-in registry. Reserved names: route, filter.

settings.description: Inline settings JSON passed to the tool. Mutually exclusive with settings_file.

settings_file.description: Path to external settings JSON file. Resolved relative to pipeline dir, or via $prefix.

input.description: Upstream input. One of: another stage name, an array of stage names (fan-in), stage.channel (named channel from route), or $input for leaf stages.

replicas.description: Number of parallel instances. Runner handles fan-out on stdin and fan-in on stdout.

trace.description: Per-stage trace toggle. When false, envelopes pass through without trace records.

cache.description: Per-stage cache mode override. Default: pipeline-level cache_default_mode.

on_error.description: Behavior when an expression (in route/filter) throws at runtime.

routes.description: For tool=route only. Map of channel-name → expression string.

expression.description: For tool=filter only. Boolean expression; envelope kept when true.

on_false.description: For tool=filter only. What to do when expression is false.

allOf.description: settings and settings_file are mutually exclusive
route requires routes; filter requires expression

stagePartial.description: Stage config fragment used in overrides — all fields optional.
